title: PARENTING - 211info
text: OSU EXTENSION SERVICE PARENTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides downloadable materials about parenting, support groups and detailed information about grandparents or older relatives raising children. 118 Ballard Hall Corvallis, OR 97331 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Parenting Materials Specialized Information and Referral * Kinship Caregivers Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HOME FOOD SAFETY AND PRESERVATION LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SUMMER CAMPS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - 4-H YOUTH DEVELOPMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
